---
title: "Perplexity — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico v3"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

# Resolve project root dinamicamente (parent do notebooks/)
_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

# --- DuckDB sobre os parquets ---
PROCESSED = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Perplexity"
con = duckdb.connect()
for table in ("conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"):
    con.execute(
        f"CREATE VIEW {table} AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{PROCESSED}/perplexity_{table}.parquet')"
    )

# --- Constantes visuais ---
SOURCE_COLOR = "#20808D"  # Perplexity teal
ACCENT = "#1FB8CD"
MUTED = "#D1D5DB"


def fmt_pct(n, total):
    """Formata 'n/total (XX%)' pra colunas de cobertura."""
    pct = n / total * 100 if total else 0
    return f"{n:,}/{total:,} ({pct:.0f}%)"


def show_df(df, **kwargs):
    """Mostra DataFrame com estilo padrao (sem index)."""
    from IPython.display import display
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index"))


def plotly_bar(x, y, title, color=SOURCE_COLOR, height=350, orientation="v"):
    """Helper pra Plotly bar consistente."""
    if orientation == "h":
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(y=x, x=y, marker_color=color, orientation="h"))
    else:
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=x, y=y, marker_color=color))
    fig.update_layout(
        title=title, height=height, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20),
    )
    return fig
```

# Visao geral

```{python}
#| label: overview
#| code-summary: "Totais por tabela"

totals = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS conversations,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) AS messages,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_events) AS tool_events,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM branches) AS branches
""").df()

range_dt = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        MIN(created_at) AS oldest,
        MAX(created_at) AS newest_created,
        MAX(updated_at) AS newest_updated
    FROM conversations
""").df()

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Tabela": "perplexity_conversations.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['conversations'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": f"{range_dt['oldest'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d} → {range_dt['newest_created'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d}"},
    {"Tabela": "perplexity_messages.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['messages'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "perplexity_tool_events.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['tool_events'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "perplexity_branches.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['branches'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
]))
```

> **Sobre este documento.** Catalogo descritivo dos parquets gerados pelo
> parser canonico do Perplexity (`src/parsers/perplexity.py`). Apresenta o que
> esta nos dados — schema, cobertura, distribuicoes, preservation. **Nao
> interpreta** conteudo (sem sentiment, clustering, topic detection). Pra
> analise qualitativa, ver projeto `~/Desktop/AI Interaction Analysis/`.

# 1. Dados disponiveis

Cada uma das 4 tabelas tem schema proprio. Aqui mostramos os campos, sua
cobertura nesta base (quantas linhas tem o campo preenchido) e amostras
diversificadas — registros que ilustram a variedade de cada tabela.

## 1.1 Conversations

A tabela de conversas eh a unidade central. Cada linha representa um
chat do Perplexity — com seus metadados (titulo, modelo, space, datas) e
campos de preservation criados pelo parser. **Pages** (Perplexity Pages
publicaveis = articles na API) tambem sao Conversations, identificadas
por `conversation_id LIKE 'page:%'`.

```{python}
#| label: conv-schema
#| code-summary: "Cobertura por campo — conversations"

cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(title) AS title,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        COUNT("mode") AS "mode",
        COUNT(project) AS project,
        COUNT(project_id) AS project_id,
        COUNT(last_seen_in_server) AS last_seen_in_server,
        SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) AS preserved_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN conversation_id LIKE 'page:%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pages_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN conversation_id NOT LIKE 'page:%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS threads_count
    FROM conversations
""").df()
total = cov["total"].iloc[0]

def conv_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(cov[field].iloc[0]), int(total))

schema_conv = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "UUID do thread, ou 'page:<slug>' pra Pages", "Cobertura": f"{total:,}/{total:,} (100%)"},
    {"Campo": "source", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Sempre 'perplexity' nesta tabela", "Cobertura": f"{total:,}/{total:,} (100%)"},
    {"Campo": "title", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Titulo da thread (servidor bumpa em rename)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("title")},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Quando a conv foi criada (entry_created_datetime)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "updated_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Ultima query — bumpa em rename (igual ChatGPT)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "message_count", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "user+assistant msgs (1 entry = 2 msgs)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "model", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "display_model do servidor (turbo, pplx_alpha, default)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("model")},
    {"Campo": "mode", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "concise/copilot/research — mapping da API CONCISE/COPILOT/ASI/ARTICLE", "Cobertura": conv_cov("mode")},
    {"Campo": "project", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "uuid do Space (alias de project_id)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("project")},
    {"Campo": "project_id", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "uuid do Space (Bookmarks, GAS, etc)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("project_id")},
    {"Campo": "is_preserved_missing", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "True se thread sumiu do listing (preservada local)", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['preserved_count'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "last_seen_in_server", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Data da ultima run em que servidor retornou", "Cobertura": conv_cov("last_seen_in_server")},
    {"Campo": "interaction_type", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "'human_ai' (user) ou 'ai_ai' (Pages de outros users bookmarkadas)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "url", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Link direto: /search/<uuid> ou /page/<slug>", "Cobertura": "100%"},
])
show_df(schema_conv)

print(f"\nDistribuicao: {int(cov['threads_count'].iloc[0])} threads do user + {int(cov['pages_count'].iloc[0])} pages bookmarkadas")
```

```{python}
#| label: conv-sample
#| code-summary: "Amostra diversificada — conversations"
#| column: page

sample_conv = con.execute("""
    WITH
    in_space AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE project_id IS NOT NULL AND conversation_id NOT LIKE 'page:%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    standalone AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE project_id IS NULL AND conversation_id NOT LIKE 'page:%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    page_conv AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE conversation_id LIKE 'page:%' LIMIT 1
    ),
    copilot AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE mode='copilot' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    concise AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE mode='concise' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    longest AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations ORDER BY message_count DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    shortest AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE message_count > 0 ORDER BY message_count ASC LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (conversation_id)
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 14) AS conv_id,
        substr(title, 1, 50) AS title,
        message_count AS msgs, model, mode,
        substr(project_id, 1, 8) AS space,
        interaction_type,
        is_preserved_missing AS preserved,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM in_space
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM standalone
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM page_conv
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM copilot
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM concise
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM longest
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM shortest
    )
    ORDER BY conversation_id
""").df()
show_df(sample_conv)
```

## 1.2 Messages

Mensagens user/assistant. **Cada entry no JSON da thread vira 2 messages**
(user query + assistant answer). Perplexity nao tem mensagens hidden tipo
ChatGPT — tools/sources viram `tool_events` e nao messages.

```{python}
#| label: msg-schema
#| code-summary: "Cobertura por campo — messages"

mcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        SUM(CASE WHEN role='user' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS user_msgs,
        SUM(CASE WHEN role='assistant' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assistant_msgs,
        COUNT(asset_paths) AS asset_paths,
        COUNT(content_types) AS content_types,
        SUM(CASE WHEN content IS NOT NULL AND content != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS content_nonempty
    FROM messages
""").df()
mtotal = mcov["total"].iloc[0]

def msg_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(mcov[field].iloc[0]), int(mtotal))

schema_msg = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "<entry_uuid>_user ou <entry_uuid>_asst", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "branch_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Sempre <conv>_main (Perplexity eh linear)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "sequence", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "Ordem na conv (1=primeira user query)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "role", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "'user' ou 'assistant' (sempre alternam)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "content", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Texto: query_str (user) ou concat dos blocks (assistant)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("content_nonempty")},
    {"Campo": "model", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "display_model — preenchido em assistant msgs", "Cobertura": msg_cov("model")},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "entry_created_datetime", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "content_types", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Sempre 'text' (Perplexity nao tem rich content)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("content_types")},
    {"Campo": "asset_paths", "Tipo": "list[str]?", "Descricao": "Paths de attachments do user (ou URL truncada se irrecuperavel)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("asset_paths")},
    {"Campo": "is_voice", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Sempre False (mic existe mas nao testado)", "Cobertura": "0 flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_hidden", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Sempre False (Perplexity nao tem hidden msgs)", "Cobertura": "0 flagged"},
])
show_df(schema_msg)

print(f"\nUser msgs: {int(mcov['user_msgs'].iloc[0])}  |  Assistant msgs: {int(mcov['assistant_msgs'].iloc[0])}")
```

```{python}
#| label: msg-sample
#| code-summary: "Amostra diversificada — messages"
#| column: page

sample_msg = con.execute("""
    WITH
    user_q AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='user'
        ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    asst_a AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='assistant'
        ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    user_long AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='user' AND length(content) > 200 LIMIT 1
    ),
    asst_long AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='assistant' AND length(content) > 1000 LIMIT 1
    ),
    with_asset AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE asset_paths IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
    ),
    in_page AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE conversation_id LIKE 'page:%' LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT
        substr(message_id, 1, 16) AS msg_id, role,
        substr(content, 1, 80) AS content_preview,
        length(content) AS content_len,
        model,
        asset_paths IS NOT NULL AS has_asset,
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 14) AS conv_id
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM user_q
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM asst_a
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM user_long
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM asst_long
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM with_asset
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM in_page
    )
""").df()
show_df(sample_msg)
```

## 1.3 Tool Events

Operacoes nao-conversacionais: search results (web), media references
(imagens/videos externos citados), asset generation (Perplexity Artifacts:
CODE_FILE, CHART, GENERATED_IMAGE).

```{python}
#| label: evt-schema
#| code-summary: "Cobertura por campo — tool_events"

ecov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(tool_name) AS tool_name,
        COUNT(file_path) AS file_path,
        COUNT(metadata_json) AS metadata_json,
        SUM(CASE WHEN event_type='search_result' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS search,
        SUM(CASE WHEN event_type='media_reference' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS media,
        SUM(CASE WHEN event_type='asset_generation' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS asset
    FROM tool_events
""").df()
etotal = ecov["total"].iloc[0]

def evt_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(ecov[field].iloc[0]), int(etotal))

schema_evt = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "event_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "<entry_uuid>_<src/media>_<idx> ou asset:<slug>", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations (thread origem)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Msg assistant que produziu o evento", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "event_type", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "search_result / media_reference / asset_generation", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "tool_name", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "web_search (search), source nome (media), asset_type (asset)", "Cobertura": evt_cov("tool_name")},
    {"Campo": "file_path", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Path do binario (so asset_generation tem)", "Cobertura": evt_cov("file_path")},
    {"Campo": "metadata_json", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "JSON com url/title/snippet (search) ou caption (asset)", "Cobertura": evt_cov("metadata_json")},
])
show_df(schema_evt)

print(f"\nDistribuicao: search_result={int(ecov['search'].iloc[0])}, media_reference={int(ecov['media'].iloc[0])}, asset_generation={int(ecov['asset'].iloc[0])}")
```

```{python}
#| label: evt-sample
#| code-summary: "Amostra — 1 tool_event de cada event_type"
#| column: page

sample_evt = con.execute("""
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (event_type)
        event_type,
        tool_name,
        substr(metadata_json, 1, 120) AS metadata_preview,
        file_path IS NOT NULL AS has_file_path
    FROM tool_events
    ORDER BY event_type
""").df()
show_df(sample_evt)
```

## 1.4 Branches

Perplexity threads sao **lineares** (nao tem fork tipo ChatGPT). Logo,
todas as branches sao `<conv>_main`, sem parent_branch_id, todas active.

```{python}
#| label: br-schema
#| code-summary: "Cobertura por campo — branches"

bcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        SUM(is_active::INT) AS active,
        SUM((parent_branch_id IS NULL)::INT) AS main,
        SUM((parent_branch_id IS NOT NULL)::INT) AS forks
    FROM branches
""").df()

schema_br = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "branch_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "<conv>_main (sempre)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "root_message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Primeira user query da thread", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "leaf_message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Ultima assistant response", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "is_active", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Sempre True (Perplexity sem fork)", "Cobertura": f"{int(bcov['active'].iloc[0]):,} (100%)"},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "created_at da conv (alinhado)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "parent_branch_id", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Sempre NULL (sem fork)", "Cobertura": f"{int(bcov['forks'].iloc[0])} forks"},
])
show_df(schema_br)
```

```{python}
#| label: br-sample
#| code-summary: "Amostra — branch tipica"

sample_br = con.execute("""
    SELECT b.*, c.title, c.message_count
    FROM branches b
    JOIN conversations c USING (conversation_id)
    ORDER BY c.message_count DESC
    LIMIT 3
""").df()

show_df(sample_br[['title', 'message_count', 'is_active', 'parent_branch_id']].rename(
    columns={'message_count': 'msgs', 'parent_branch_id': 'parent'}
))
```

# 2. Cobertura e gaps

Onde estao as lacunas — campos que nem sempre o servidor preenche, ou
artefatos que o parser nao consegue resolver completamente.

## 2.1 Convs sem `model`

`Conversation.model` sai do `display_model` da primeira entry. Quando
o servidor nao retornou (raro), fica NULL.

```{python}
#| label: model-gap-temporal
#| code-summary: "Distribuicao temporal das convs sem model"

no_model = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE model IS NULL) AS sem_model,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE model IS NOT NULL) AS com_model
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY mes ORDER BY mes
""").df()

fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=no_model["mes"], y=no_model["com_model"],
                     name="Com model", marker_color=SOURCE_COLOR))
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=no_model["mes"], y=no_model["sem_model"],
                     name="Sem model", marker_color=MUTED))
fig.update_layout(
    barmode="stack", title="Convs por mes — com e sem model",
    height=350, template="plotly_white",
    xaxis=dict(type="category"),
    margin=dict(t=50, b=80, l=40, r=20),
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2),
)
fig.show()

perfil = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN model IS NULL THEN 'Sem model' ELSE 'Com model' END AS grupo,
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        ROUND(AVG(message_count), 1) AS avg_msgs,
        MEDIAN(message_count)::INT AS median_msgs,
        MAX(message_count) AS max_msgs
    FROM conversations GROUP BY grupo
""").df()
show_df(perfil)
```

## 2.2 Cobertura de `model` em messages

`Message.model` so eh preenchido em msgs `role=assistant` (user msgs
sao sempre NULL por design — user nao escolhe model).

```{python}
#| label: model-msg-coverage
#| code-summary: "Cobertura de model em messages por role"

mcov_role = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        role,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(model) AS com_model,
        COUNT(*) - COUNT(model) AS sem_model,
        ROUND(COUNT(model) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_cobertura
    FROM messages GROUP BY role ORDER BY role
""").df()
show_df(mcov_role)
```

## 2.3 Asset paths e attachments irrecuperaveis

Perplexity faz cleanup de uploads antigos no S3. Attachments com
`status='failed_upstream_deleted'` no manifest sao referenciados na msg
mas o binario nao existe mais. Equivalente aos 8 assets irrecuperaveis
do ChatGPT.

```{python}
#| label: asset-resolved
#| code-summary: "Cobertura de file_path em asset_generation events"

asset_cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT event_type,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(file_path) AS resolved,
        ROUND(COUNT(file_path) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct
    FROM tool_events
    WHERE event_type = 'asset_generation'
    GROUP BY event_type
""").df()
show_df(asset_cov)
```

```{python}
#| label: attachment-status
#| code-summary: "Status dos attachments no manifest (raw)"

import json
manifest_path = _project_root / "data" / "raw" / "Perplexity" / "thread_attachments_manifest.json"
if manifest_path.exists():
    manifest = json.loads(manifest_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    statuses = {}
    for entry in manifest.values():
        s = entry.get("status", "ok") if entry.get("relpath") else "failed_upstream_deleted"
        statuses[s] = statuses.get(s, 0) + 1
    df_status = pd.DataFrame([
        {"Status": k, "Count": v} for k, v in statuses.items()
    ])
    show_df(df_status)
else:
    print("Manifest nao encontrado")
```

```{python}
#| label: msg-asset-distrib
#| code-summary: "Quantos asset_paths por msg (uploads do user)"

asset_count = con.execute("""
    SELECT len(asset_paths) AS n_assets, COUNT(*) AS n_msgs
    FROM messages WHERE asset_paths IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY n_assets ORDER BY n_assets
""").df()

if len(asset_count) > 0:
    fig = plotly_bar(
        x=asset_count["n_assets"].astype(str), y=asset_count["n_msgs"],
        title=f"Distribuicao de uploads por msg ({int(asset_count['n_msgs'].sum()):,} msgs com pelo menos 1 asset)",
        height=300,
    )
    fig.update_xaxes(title="Assets na msg")
    fig.update_yaxes(title="N msgs")
    fig.show()
```

## 2.4 Threads em Spaces (mapping)

Spaces (collections na API) sao colecoes de threads + pages + files. O
parser preenche `Conversation.project_id` com o uuid do space quando a
thread pertence a algum.

```{python}
#| label: space-mapping
#| code-summary: "Distribuicao de threads por space"

space_dist = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COALESCE(substr(project_id, 1, 8), '<sem space>') AS space_uuid,
        SUM(CASE WHEN conversation_id LIKE 'page:%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pages,
        SUM(CASE WHEN conversation_id NOT LIKE 'page:%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS threads,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY space_uuid
    ORDER BY total DESC
""").df()
show_df(space_dist)
```

# 3. Volumes e distribuicoes

Counts e timelines do que esta nos dados. **Sem interpretacao** — so o
"o que tem".

## 3.1 Conversas criadas por mes

```{python}
#| label: conv-timeline
#| code-summary: "Convs por mes (timeline)"

timeline = con.execute("""
    SELECT strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY mes ORDER BY mes
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=timeline["mes"], y=timeline["n"],
    title=f"Conversas criadas por mes ({len(timeline)} meses cobertos)",
    height=350,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="Mes", type="category")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()
```

## 3.2 Mensagens por role

```{python}
#| label: msgs-by-role
#| code-summary: "Mensagens por role (user vs assistant)"

by_role = con.execute("""
    SELECT role,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        ROUND(AVG(length(content)), 1) AS avg_chars,
        MAX(length(content)) AS max_chars
    FROM messages GROUP BY role
""").df()
show_df(by_role)

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=by_role["role"].tolist(), y=by_role["total"].tolist(),
    title="Mensagens por role",
    height=300,
)
fig.show()
```

## 3.3 ToolEvents por event_type

```{python}
#| label: events-by-type
#| code-summary: "ToolEvents por event_type"

evt_types = con.execute("""
    SELECT event_type, COUNT(*) AS n,
           COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) AS n_convs
    FROM tool_events GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()
show_df(evt_types)

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=evt_types["event_type"], y=evt_types["n"],
    title="ToolEvents por categoria",
    height=350,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="event_type")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N events")
fig.show()
```

- **search_result**: web sources (extraidos de `blocks[*].web_result_block.web_results`)
- **media_reference**: refs externas (YouTube, imagens web) — citadas mas nao baixadas
- **asset_generation**: artifacts gerados pela IA (CODE_FILE / CHART / GENERATED_IMAGE)

## 3.4 Modelos top 10

```{python}
#| label: top-models
#| code-summary: "Top 10 model_slugs"

top_models = con.execute("""
    SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations
    WHERE model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10
""").df()

if len(top_models) > 0:
    fig = plotly_bar(
        x=top_models["model"], y=top_models["n"],
        title="Top modelos (Conversation.model = display_model do servidor)",
        height=350,
    )
    fig.update_xaxes(title="model")
    fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
    fig.show()
```

## 3.5 Distribuicao por mode (concise vs copilot vs research)

Mapping da API Perplexity → canonico v3:

- `CONCISE` → `concise` (Auto/quick)
- `COPILOT` → `copilot` (Deep Research, nome legacy do servidor)
- `ASI` → `research` (Computer mode, Pro-only)
- `ARTICLE` → `research` (Pages = articles)

```{python}
#| label: mode-distrib
#| code-summary: "Distribuicao de mode"

mode_dist = con.execute("""
    SELECT mode, COUNT(*) AS n,
        ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1) AS pct
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY mode ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

fig = go.Figure(go.Pie(
    labels=mode_dist["mode"],
    values=mode_dist["n"],
    marker=dict(colors=[SOURCE_COLOR, ACCENT, "#9CC1B5", MUTED]),
    textinfo="label+percent+value",
))
fig.update_layout(
    title="Convs por mode",
    height=350, template="plotly_white",
    margin=dict(t=50, b=40),
)
fig.show()
show_df(mode_dist)
```

## 3.6 Convs em Spaces vs standalone vs Pages

```{python}
#| label: project-distrib
#| code-summary: "Distribuicao em Spaces / Pages / standalone"

distrib = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN conversation_id LIKE 'page:%' THEN 'Page (bookmarked)'
            WHEN project_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Em Space'
            ELSE 'Standalone'
        END AS categoria,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY categoria ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

fig = go.Figure(go.Pie(
    labels=distrib["categoria"], values=distrib["n"],
    marker=dict(colors=[SOURCE_COLOR, ACCENT, MUTED]),
    textinfo="label+percent+value",
))
fig.update_layout(
    title="Convs por categoria",
    height=350, template="plotly_white",
    margin=dict(t=50, b=40),
)
fig.show()
show_df(distrib)
```

## 3.7 Top Spaces

```{python}
#| label: top-spaces
#| code-summary: "Top spaces por count de convs"

top_spaces = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(project_id, 1, 8) AS space_uuid,
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        SUM(CASE WHEN conversation_id LIKE 'page:%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pages,
        SUM(CASE WHEN conversation_id NOT LIKE 'page:%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS threads
    FROM conversations
    WHERE project_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY space_uuid ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

# Tenta enriquecer com title do space
spaces_dir = _project_root / "data" / "merged" / "Perplexity" / "spaces"
if spaces_dir.exists():
    titles = {}
    for sd in spaces_dir.iterdir():
        if sd.is_dir():
            meta = sd / "metadata.json"
            if meta.exists():
                try:
                    d = json.loads(meta.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                    titles[d.get("uuid", "")[:8]] = d.get("title", "")
                except Exception:
                    pass
    top_spaces["title"] = top_spaces["space_uuid"].map(titles).fillna("?")

show_df(top_spaces[["title", "space_uuid", "threads", "pages", "n"]].rename(columns={"n": "total"}))
```

## 3.8 Distribuicao de tamanho (msgs por conv)

```{python}
#| label: size-histogram
#| code-summary: "Histograma de message_count"

sizes = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN message_count <= 2 THEN '1-2'
            WHEN message_count <= 5 THEN '3-5'
            WHEN message_count <= 10 THEN '6-10'
            WHEN message_count <= 20 THEN '11-20'
            WHEN message_count <= 50 THEN '21-50'
            ELSE '50+'
        END AS bin,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY bin
""").df()
order = ['1-2', '3-5', '6-10', '11-20', '21-50', '50+']
sizes['bin'] = pd.Categorical(sizes['bin'], categories=order, ordered=True)
sizes = sizes.sort_values('bin')

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=sizes["bin"].astype(str), y=sizes["n"],
    title="Distribuicao de tamanho de conv (msgs user+assistant)",
    height=300,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="N msgs por conv")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()

stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT MIN(message_count) AS min, MAX(message_count) AS max,
           ROUND(AVG(message_count), 1) AS avg, MEDIAN(message_count)::INT AS median
    FROM conversations
""").df()
show_df(stats)
```

# 4. Preservation

Campos canonicos do parser pra distinguir convs **ativas no servidor** das
**preservadas localmente** (que sumiram do servidor mas continuam no
nosso merged). Tambem cobre **orphans** em spaces (caso especifico do
Perplexity).

## 4.1 Active vs preserved_missing

```{python}
#| label: preservation-counts
#| code-summary: "Active vs preserved_missing"

preservation = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN is_preserved_missing THEN 'Preserved missing' ELSE 'Active' END AS status,
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        MIN(last_seen_in_server) AS first_seen,
        MAX(last_seen_in_server) AS last_seen
    FROM conversations GROUP BY is_preserved_missing
""").df()
show_df(preservation)
```

## 4.2 Orphans em spaces

Threads que aparecem em `list_collection_threads` (dentro de space) mas
nao em `list_ask_threads` (listing global) — foram deletadas globalmente
mas o space preserva metadata como reference. Comportamento empirico do
servidor Perplexity (validado 2026-05-01).

A flag `_orphan` esta no `threads_index.json` de cada space dentro do
merged.

```{python}
#| label: orphan-detail
#| code-summary: "Orphans em cada space"

orphans_by_space = []
if spaces_dir.exists():
    for sd in spaces_dir.iterdir():
        if not sd.is_dir():
            continue
        ti = sd / "threads_index.json"
        meta = sd / "metadata.json"
        if not ti.exists():
            continue
        try:
            arr = json.loads(ti.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            orphans = [t for t in arr if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get("_orphan")]
            title = "?"
            if meta.exists():
                try:
                    title = json.loads(meta.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("title", "?")
                except Exception:
                    pass
            orphans_by_space.append({
                "space": title,
                "space_uuid": sd.name[:8],
                "threads_total": len(arr),
                "orphans": len(orphans),
            })
        except Exception:
            continue

if orphans_by_space:
    df_orph = pd.DataFrame(orphans_by_space)
    show_df(df_orph)
    print(f"\nTotal orphans em spaces: {df_orph['orphans'].sum()}")
```

## 4.3 Pages vs Threads (distinction)

| Aspecto | Threads | Pages |
|---|---|---|
| `conversation_id` | UUID original | `page:<slug>` |
| `mode` | concise / copilot | research |
| `interaction_type` | human_ai | ai_ai (autor != user) |
| `url` | /search/<uuid> | /page/<slug> |
| Origem | Criadas pelo user | Bookmarkadas de outros users |

```{python}
#| label: pages-detail
#| code-summary: "Detalhe das Pages capturadas"

pages_detail = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 30) AS conv_id,
        substr(title, 1, 60) AS title,
        message_count AS msgs,
        substr(project_id, 1, 8) AS space_uuid,
        interaction_type
    FROM conversations
    WHERE conversation_id LIKE 'page:%'
    ORDER BY title
""").df()
show_df(pages_detail)
```

## 4.4 Threads pinadas (`is_pinned`)

Threads marcadas como pinadas pelo user no UI (`Pin` no menu de
`/library`). Capturadas via `list_pinned_ask_threads` POST. Campo
canonico em `Conversation.is_pinned`.

```{python}
#| label: pinned-detail
#| code-summary: "Threads com is_pinned=true"

pinned_threads = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 12) AS conv_id,
        substr(title, 1, 70) AS title,
        mode,
        message_count AS msgs,
        substr(project_id, 1, 8) AS space_uuid,
        date_trunc('day', updated_at) AS last_query
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_pinned = true
    ORDER BY updated_at DESC
""").df()
print(f"Total pinadas: {len(pinned_threads)} de {totals['conversations'].iloc[0]} conversations")
show_df(pinned_threads) if len(pinned_threads) else None
```

## 4.5 Skills em spaces (Computer Skills)

Skills sao instrucoes reutilizaveis carregadas via SKILL.md (YAML frontmatter
+ markdown). Capturadas em `data/raw/Perplexity/spaces/{uuid}/skills.json`
+ `data/raw/Perplexity/user/skills.json`. Endpoint:
`GET /rest/skills?scope={collection|individual|global|organization}&scope_id=<UUID>`.

```{python}
#| label: skills-detail
#| code-summary: "Skills capturadas (collection-level + user-level)"

import pandas as pd
skills_rows = []
# Collection-level skills (in spaces)
if spaces_dir.exists():
    for sd in spaces_dir.iterdir():
        if not sd.is_dir():
            continue
        sk = sd / "skills.json"
        meta = sd / "metadata.json"
        if not sk.exists():
            continue
        try:
            arr = json.loads(sk.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            space_title = "?"
            if meta.exists():
                m = json.loads(meta.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                space_title = m.get("title") or "?"
            for s in arr:
                skills_rows.append({
                    "scope": s.get("scope", "?"),
                    "container": space_title,
                    "name": s.get("name") or "?",
                    "description": (s.get("description") or "")[:90],
                    "enabled": s.get("enabled"),
                    "created": s.get("created_at", "")[:10],
                })
        except Exception:
            continue
# User-level skills (raw root, not merged — read direct)
raw_root = _project_root / "data" / "raw" / "Perplexity"
user_skills_path = raw_root / "user" / "skills.json"
if user_skills_path.exists():
    try:
        arr = json.loads(user_skills_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        for s in arr:
            skills_rows.append({
                "scope": s.get("scope", "individual"),
                "container": "(user)",
                "name": s.get("name") or "?",
                "description": (s.get("description") or "")[:90],
                "enabled": s.get("enabled"),
                "created": s.get("created_at", "")[:10],
            })
    except Exception:
        pass

if skills_rows:
    skills_df = pd.DataFrame(skills_rows).sort_values(["scope", "container", "name"])
    print(f"Total skills capturadas: {len(skills_df)}")
    show_df(skills_df)
else:
    print("Nenhuma skill capturada nesta base.")
```

## 4.6 Tabela completa filtravel

Todas as conversations. Use a barra de busca pra filtrar por titulo,
space, ou qualquer campo. Click nos cabecalhos pra ordenar.

```{python}
#| label: full-table
#| code-summary: "Tabela filtravel (itables)"
#| column: page

from itables import show as itable_show

full = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 16) AS conv_id,
        title,
        mode,
        substr(project_id, 1, 8) AS space,
        message_count AS msgs,
        model,
        interaction_type AS itype,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created,
        strftime(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS updated,
        is_preserved_missing AS preserved
    FROM conversations
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
""").df()

itable_show(
    full,
    paging=True,
    searching=True,
    ordering=True,
    info=True,
    lengthMenu=[10, 25, 50, 100],
    classes="display compact",
)
```

```{python}
#| label: cleanup
#| code-summary: "Fechar conexao"
#| echo: false

con.close()
```
